name: libnss-mdns
title: libnss-mdns
summary: NSS module for Multicast DNS name resolution
description:
NSS module for Multicast DNS name resolution
nss-mdns is a plugin for the GNU Name Service Switch (NSS) functionality
of the GNU C Library (glibc) providing host name resolution via Multicast
DNS (using Zeroconf, aka Apple Bonjour / Apple Rendezvous ), effectively
allowing name resolution by common Unix/Linux programs in the ad-hoc mDNS
domain .local.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnss-mdns because NSS module for Multicast DNS name resolution.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnss-mdns as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnss-mdns with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnss-mdns --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
